title: notholaena fraseri
intro: Notholaena fraseri, also known as Fraser's fern or Fraser's rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Notholaena fraseri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
